description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image with the docker:stable-dind service. Define a single stage named build and a job called build that runs in the build stage, logs in to the GitLab Container Registry with "docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY" in before_script, then executes "./build/src/build.sh" as its script. The job should run only on branch pipelines (only branches) and be tagged with the docker runner tag. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are required.
